steps.title: Use the conversion factor
steps.content: Each leuga is $7{,}200$ pedes. To convert from leugas to pedes, multiply the number of leugas by $7{,}200$.

steps.title: Convert the length
steps.content:
For $4.5$ leugas:
$$4.5(7{,}200)=32{,}400$$
This gives the number of pedes equivalent to the given length. The answer is 32400.
